title: helichrysum yurterianum
intro: Helichrysum yurterianum, also known as Yurt's Everlasting, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and silvery-gray foliage. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum yurterianum lie in its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones, which possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and support the immune system, making it useful in the treatment of wounds, burns, and other skin conditions. Helichrysum yurterianum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or oil, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote healing and relaxation.
